title: A Pit in Spain Holds the Key to a Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich on a podcast about Neanderthal DNA research centered on an archaeological site in Spain. The discussion covers findings from genetic analysis of ancient human remains and their implications for understanding human evolution.
